YACHT POOL INTERNATIONAL
Insurance Quotation

Insured: Jan Novák
Vessel: Bavaria 40 Cruiser

Boat value: 2 500 000 Kč
Boat Inventory value: 180 000 Kč
Trailer value: 95 000 Kč

Hull insurance premium: 1 800 EUR
TPL premium: 350 EUR
Passenger accident insurance premium: 120 EUR
Total insurance cost: 2 270 EUR

Hull insurance deductible: 1 500 EUR
TPL limit: Up to 7,5mil €

Cruising area: Mediterranean including Black Sea

GENERAL CONDITIONS FOR YACHT INSURANCE

Section 1 – Hull
The hull deductible applies per incident.

Section 2 – Third Party Liability
The standard TPL limit is up to 7,5mil €.
Extensions available on request.

Section 3 – Crew and Passengers
Personal accident cover for up to 8 persons.

YACHT POOL INTERNATIONAL
Insurance Quotation – Extended Cover

Insured: Jan Novák
Vessel: Bavaria 40 Cruiser

Boat value: 2 500 000 Kč
Boat Inventory value: 180 000 Kč
Trailer value: 95 000 Kč

Hull insurance premium: 2 100 EUR
TPL premium: 420 EUR
Passenger accident insurance premium: 180 EUR
Total insurance cost: 2 700 EUR

Hull insurance deductible: 800 EUR
TPL limit: Up to 7,5mil €

Cruising area: Europe including Atlantic coast and Baltic Sea

MANDATORY PRE-CONTRACTUAL INFORMATION

This document is a summary for information purposes only.
Please refer to the policy wording for full terms.

Insurer: YACHT POOL International Insurance Brokers GmbH
Regulated by: FMA Austria
